channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sen. Cassidy backs Erica Schwartz as Trump's CDC nominee
item.description: Senate HELP Committee Chairman Bill Cassidy announced Thursday he will support President Trump's pick for CDC director.

item.title: Trump tech aide briefed on OpenAI model going rogue
item.description: White House tech adviser Michael Kratsios was briefed on OpenAI's model going rogue and is monitoring the situation.

item.title: House votes to curb Trump's Iran war powers; Senate backs president
item.description: The Republican-led House passed a resolution Thursday directing President Trump to halt U.S. military action against Iran.

item.title: Trump administration sued over disaster funding conditions
item.description: More than two dozen states sued the Trump administration Thursday over election and immigration conditions tied to disaster aid.
